docs.title: Lesson overview
docs.text:
Description Add a short description of the training materail should be inserted here.

Prerequisites To be able to follow this course, learners should have knowledge in:  1. First requirement  2. Second requirement

Learning Outcomes: By the end of the course, learners will be able to:  1. First item  2. Second item

Target Audience: Researchers, undergraduate students, postgraduate students, etc…

Level: Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced

License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

Funding: This project has received funding from [name of funders].

docs.title: What is the ELIXIR Lesson Template?
docs.text:
The ELIXIR Lesson Template is a standardized framework designed to help educators create high-quality, consistent training materials for life sciences. It uses MkDocs, a static site generator, to produce user-friendly, web-based lessons.

Pros:

  • Consistency: Ensures all lessons have a uniform structure, making them easier to follow and maintain.
  • Accessibility: Web-based format allows learners to access materials from anywhere, anytime.
  • Collaboration: Facilitates contributions from multiple authors, enhancing the quality and breadth of content.
  • Customization: Offers flexibility to tailor lessons to specific needs while maintaining a core structure.
  • Integration: Supports various plugins for enhanced functionality, such as video embedding and bibliography management

The ELIXIR Lesson template requires some familiarity with MkDocs and Markdown - but this course got you covered for these foundational skills and more!

Training material about the use of the ELIXIR Lesson Template

We also provide training material about how to use the ELIXIR Lesson template.

docs.title: Introduction to Lightweight Markup Language
docs.text: Markdown is a lightweight markup language that allows you to write content in a simple and easy-to-read plain-text format, which can be converted to various formats like HTML or PDF. Its simplicity and readability make it ideal for documentation, technical writing, and lesson creation.

docs.title: Why Markdown is Essential for ELIXIR Lessons
docs.text: Markdown’s versatility and ease of use are key for creating accessible and collaborative lesson content in ELIXIR. It enables researchers and educators to focus on content while ensuring compatibility with a variety of tools and platforms. By using Markdown, lessons can be version-controlled and easily shared within the community.

docs.title: Writing Headers
docs.text:
Use # symbols to define headers:

# Header 1
## Header 2
### Header 3

docs.title: Ordered Lists:
docs.text:
1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

docs.title: Unordered Lists:
docs.text:
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Sub-item

docs.title: Bold and Italic Text:
docs.text:
• Bold: **text**
  • Italic: *text*
  • Bold and Italic: ***text***

docs.title: Inline Code and Code Blocks:
docs.text:
• Inline Code: `code`

  • Code Blocks:
    Code block content

docs.title: Embedding external links:
docs.text:
When linking to an external site, use:

[Google](http://google.com)

docs.title: Linking to internal pages:
docs.text:
When linking to internal pages, you can manually link to the pages like this:

[Planning](planning)
Will link to the planning page.

If you change the file name, you’ll have to update all of your links.

docs.title: Adding Images:
docs.text:
![Alt Text](https://example.com/image.png)
Supported attributes include:
  • click: if true, the image will be clickable -> the image will be loaded in another tab
  • url: f you want the image to link to anther page
  • alt: describes the image and is used for people that are visually impaired
  • caption: Text that will appear under the image
  • inline: if true this image can be used in a list
  • max-width: Max width in px or em

Make sure to credit images under CC-BY or other appropriate licenses.

docs.title: Creating Tables:
docs.text:
| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Data 1   | Data 2   | Data 3   |

docs.title: Interactive Checklists:
docs.text:
- [ ] Task 1
- [x] Completed Task

docs.title: Markdown Editors
docs.text:
There are various tools available for writing and editing Markdown:

  • Visual Studio Code: A powerful code editor with Markdown plugins.
  • Typora: A clean and distraction-free Markdown editor.
  • Dillinger: An online Markdown editor for quick editing and previews.

docs.title: Hands-on Practice
docs.text: Explore these tools to gain proficiency in Markdown. Use their preview and export features to create well-formatted documents for ELIXIR lessons.
